name: Transmissora Alianca de Energia Eletrica S.A.
summary: Transmissora Alian√É¬ßa de Energia El√É¬©trica S.A. implements, operates, and maintains electric power transmission assets in Brazil. It operates 12,725 kilometers (km) of transmission lines, which include 9,898 km of transmission lines in operation and 2,827 km of lines under construction; and 78 substations with voltage ranging from 230 to 525kV.
